name: PAST | Isagi Yoichi
description:
★ Friends should always be together every step of the way, so you will always be by his side.

---

→ Before everything changed completely, you were there. Isagi tries his best to get by in highschool both as a student and forward for Ichinan High. He doubts his dreams.

→You are his best friend, though you can decide if you've been together since childhood or met at highschool. Don't throw away your friendship bracelet with him, okay?

→ Requested by... Anon! Your request was a bit vague, so I hope this Before BL AU is fine with you!
creator: lobulitzer
